creator: xelalex_maker@web.de
text:
Created attachment 169749
Replace expr with commands provided by bash itself.

The problem seems to be with the expr-utility, which does not understand the match-command.

I really wonder, why this is needed at all, given that bash provides all the necessary commands internally.

The attached patch for /usr/local/share/geogebra/geogebra/geogebra seems to fix the issues in the script, but still leaves a problem with a library.
